column1:
Translate English statements into logical expressions using logic symbols.  
Express conditional statements equivalently in English using various forms.  
Identify and construct the converse, inverse, and contrapositive of conditional propositions.  
Evaluate the truth values of compound propositions involving conditional and biconditional operations.  
Complete and interpret truth tables for conditional and biconditional statements.  
Determine the truth value of compound expressions given partial truth assignments.
